evidence.excerpt:
## Build Config Summary
- Makefile markers=[qemu-system, -machine, riscv, ENTRY, disk.img]
  excerpt: K=src U=usrinit SBI=sbi/fw_jump.elf LINKER=linker/kernel.ld  FS?=FAT MAC?=SIFIVE_U  ifeq ($(MAC),SIFIVE_U) DISK:=$K/link_null.o endif  ifeq ($(MAC),QEMU) DISK:=$K/link_disk.o endif  OBJS += \ 	$K/entry.o \ 	$K/bio.o \ 	$(DISK) \ 	$K/ramdisk.o \ 	$K/spi.o \ 	$K/sd.o \ 	$K/diskio.o \ 	$K/disk.o \ 	$K/
- linker/kernel.ld markers=[riscv, ENTRY]
  excerpt: OUTPUT_ARCH(riscv) ENTRY(_entry)  BASE_ADDRE
